intents.name: book_ticket
examples: book a ticket from Delhi to Mumbai tomorrow
I want to reserve a ticket
please book train ticket for me
book journey from Pune to Hyderabad
reserve seat from Jaipur to Delhi
Mumbai se Kolkata ticket book karo
intents.reply: Sure, I can book that. Please tell me the source, destination, travel date, passenger name, and age.

intents.name: journey_type
intents.reply: Thanks. I will note whether the journey is reserved or unreserved.

intents.name: provide_details
examples: from Delhi to Mumbai tomorrow for Rahul age 28
Delhi se Mumbai kal Rahul umar 28
I will travel from Chennai to Bengaluru today
Hyderabad to Jaipur for Neha age 22
intents.reply: Thanks. I am filling those details now.

intents.name: payment
intents.reply: I will send the payment link by SMS after confirmation.

intents.name: confirm_booking
intents.reply: I will confirm the booking now.

intents.name: reset_booking
intents.reply: No problem. I have cleared the booking details.

intents.name: greeting
intents.reply: Hello. I can help you book a ticket by call.
